definition: The Argo CD CRD/controller that generates multiple Application resources from a set of parameters (Git directories, clusters, pull requests, etc.).
usage_context: CRD/API name; used across operator-manual/applicationset/*; component name argocd-applicationset-controller

definition: The Argo CD CRD that groups Applications and defines RBAC, source/destination restrictions for a project.
usage_context: CRD/API kind name; declarative-setup and RBAC docs

definition: The Kubernetes cluster an Application's resources are deployed to, as specified in spec.destination.
usage_context: Application spec field name and prose describing where resources are deployed

definition: The literal Application sync-status enum value shown in the CLI/UI when the live state deviates from the desired Git state.

Prose description of an Application whose live state does not match Git. Predicate form ('is out of sync') is unhyphenated; attributive form ('out-of-sync status') is hyphenated per standard English usage — both are correct in their grammatical position.
forbidden_variants: N/A (context-dependent hyphenation is correct; flag only mid-sentence inconsistency within the same document)

definition: A user-defined plugin that generates Kubernetes manifests from a source that Argo CD does not natively support (e.g. a custom templating tool).
usage_context: Expanded on first use per page
status: N/A — current expand-then-abbreviate pattern is correct practice

definition: Authentication approach where a user logs in once via an external identity provider (OIDC/OAuth2) to access Argo CD and other systems.
forbidden_variants: N/A — expand once per page before using SSO

definition: The external Git repository that stores the desired-state manifests Argo CD syncs from.
usage_context: General prose describing the source of truth

definition: The argocd-repo-server component/pod that clones and caches Git/Helm repositories and renders manifests. A distinct system component, not a synonym for 'Git repository.'
usage_context: Architecture and operator-manual docs referring to the running service
forbidden_variants: Repository Server (as a synonym for the concept 'Git repository' — keep repo-server strictly for the component)

definition: A Kubernetes manifest annotated with argocd.argoproj.io/hook that Argo CD runs at a specific point in the sync lifecycle (PreSync, Sync, PostSync, SyncFail).
Restoring an Application to a previously deployed Git revision using Argo CD's built-in history mechanism.
